title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Lido Learning - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Lido Learning - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!
